goals: Store personal preferences for genealogical research sessions
Search for stored context before starting a new research query
Review all stored memories to verify what has been saved
Remove outdated or incorrect memories from storage

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and detail-oriented, with a passion for uncovering family histories in the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region. Prefers organized, documented approaches to research.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced in genealogical research methods and local French history, but unfamiliar with technical memory management systems or tool names.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored their research preferences, verified retrieval of past context, reviewed all stored memories, and removed any outdated information.
